title: cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. minor
intro: Cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. minor is a plant species within the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as a small-leaved or lesser ivy-leaved toadflax. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cymbalaria microcalyx subsp. minor include its potential to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, or as a dried herb, though more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
